keyEvents.text: Goal!  Martinique 1, Curaçao 0. Brighton Labeau (Martinique) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Andy Marny with a cross.
Jérémy Corinus (Martinique) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Juriën Gaari (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Penalty saved! Mickaël Biron (Martinique) fails to capitalise on this great opportunity,  right footed shot saved  in the bottom left corner.
Daniel Hérelle (Martinique) is shown the red card for violent conduct.
Leandro Bacuna (Curaçao) is shown the red card for violent conduct.
Mickaël Biron (Martinique) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Martinique. Carlo Rabathaly replaces Karl Fabien.

Substitution, Martinique. Ambroise Nelson Felicitet replaces Jérémy Corinus.
Carlo Rabathaly (Martinique) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Martinique. Enrick Reuperné replaces Boris Sébastien Moltenis because of an injury.
